title: Haier India is Hiring: Quality Control Engineer (Mid-Level)

jsonLd.title: Haier India is Hiring: Quality Control Engineer (Mid-Level)
jsonLd.description:
Haier India has an exciting opening for a Quality Control Engineer at our Coimbatore office. Join a company that values innovation, collaboration, and continuous learning.

About Haier India:
Haier India is a leading organization in the On-site sector, committed to excellence, innovation, and employee growth. We offer a dynamic work environment where talent is recognized and rewarded.

Key Responsibilities:
• Train and supervise shop floor workers and supervisors
• Coordinate with design and engineering teams on product improvements
• Prepare production cost analysis and efficiency reports
• Manage supplier quality audits and vendor development
• Manage raw material procurement and inventory levels
• Ensure compliance with safety regulations and factory acts
• Maintain accurate production records and prepare daily reports

Required Skills & Qualifications:
• B.Tech / B.E. in Computer Science or related discipline
• 12-20 years of relevant experience
• Proficiency in Supply Chain Management
• Proficiency in PPAP
• Proficiency in PLC/SCADA
• Proficiency in SolidWorks
• Proficiency in AutoCAD
• Proficiency in Lean Manufacturing
• Proficiency in Statistical Process Control
• Proficiency in TPM

Work Mode: On-site - Work from our office

What We Offer:
• Competitive salary with performance-linked incentives
• Referral bonus program
• Work-from-home flexibility
• Annual performance appraisal
• Company-sponsored certifications
• International travel opportunities for senior roles
• Salary Range: 35 LPA - 70 LPA per annum

Location: Coimbatore, Tamil Nadu, India

If you are excited about this opportunity, apply now and take the next step in your career journey with Haier India!
